data.name: Experimental teaching sample — not for production use.
data.value: Experimental teaching sample — not for production use.

data.name: Review the plan below, then confirm. Activation starts billing.
data.value: Review the plan below, then confirm. Activation starts billing.

data.name: View all subscriptions in the publisher admin →
data.value: View all subscriptions in the publisher admin →

data.name: Resolved from your marketplace purchase token.
data.value: Resolved from your marketplace purchase token.

data.name: No purchase token was provided. Open this page from the Marketplace 'Configure account' link.
data.value: No purchase token was provided. Open this page from the Marketplace 'Configure account' link.

data.name: The purchase could not be resolved.
data.value: The purchase could not be resolved.

data.name: The purchase could not be resolved (the token may be invalid or expired).
data.value: The purchase could not be resolved (the token may be invalid or expired).

data.name: Activation could not be completed. Please retry from the Marketplace.
data.value: Activation could not be completed. Please retry from the Marketplace.

data.name: Authoritative state store · read-only view. State changes require explicit confirmation on the detail page.
data.value: Authoritative state store · read-only view. State changes require explicit confirmation on the detail page.

data.name: Microsoft Marketplace drives the lifecycle. This app is the publisher side: it activates a purchase, then keeps its state store in sync with events Microsoft sends. It never invents state.
data.value: Microsoft Marketplace drives the lifecycle. This app is the publisher side: it activates a purchase, then keeps its state store in sync with events Microsoft sends. It never invents state.

data.name: This app calls the Fulfillment API.
data.value: This app calls the Fulfillment API.

data.name: Resolve → Activate — confirmed here, only from PendingFulfillmentStart. Starts billing.
data.value: Resolve → Activate — confirmed here, only from PendingFulfillmentStart. Starts billing.

data.name: Arrive as a connection webhook; this app validates it, then updates state.
data.value: Arrive as a connection webhook; this app validates it, then updates state.

data.name: In this demo the Fulfillment API Emulator plays Microsoft. To trigger the webhook events above, open the emulator's Subscriptions tab and act on a subscription — then refresh here to watch the authoritative state follow.
data.value: In this demo the Fulfillment API Emulator plays Microsoft. To trigger the webhook events above, open the emulator's Subscriptions tab and act on a subscription — then refresh here to watch the authoritative state follow.

data.name: No subscriptions yet. Activate one from a buyer landing link to see it here.
data.value: No subscriptions yet. Activate one from a buyer landing link to see it here.

data.name: Activation calls the Fulfillment Activate API and starts billing. Confirm before proceeding.
data.value: Activation calls the Fulfillment Activate API and starts billing. Confirm before proceeding.

data.name: No publisher actions available from the current state ({0}).
data.value: No publisher actions available from the current state ({0}).

data.name: From here, changes (Suspend, Reinstate, Change plan, Unsubscribe) are Microsoft-initiated and arrive as a connection webhook — this app validates it and updates state. In this demo, trigger them from the emulator's Subscriptions tab, then refresh this page.
data.value: From here, changes (Suspend, Reinstate, Change plan, Unsubscribe) are Microsoft-initiated and arrive as a connection webhook — this app validates it and updates state. In this demo, trigger them from the emulator's Subscriptions tab, then refresh this page.

data.name: Subscription cannot be activated from its current state.
data.value: Subscription cannot be activated from its current state.

data.name: Activation failed while calling the Fulfillment API.
data.value: Activation failed while calling the Fulfillment API.
